name: Nicci's Nectary Makeout
descrip: Force an intoxicating aphrodisiac into your prey.
outcome: [AttackerName] keeps [TargetName] liplocked and lovingly entangles tongues with [TargetHimOrHer], gradually pouring [AttackerHisOrHer] sweet nectar directly into [TargetHisOrHer] mouth amid the passionate makeout, until [TargetHeOrShe] can't help but hungrily gulp down the delicious-tasting amber liquid!
miss: [AttackerName] keeps [TargetName] liplocked and lovingly entangles tongues with [TargetHimOrHer], gradually pouring her sweet nectar directly into [TargetName]'s mouth amid the passionate makeout, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to avoid swallowing the aphrodisiac syrup and spits it right back out!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] can feel the intoxicating nectar imbue [TargetHimOrHer] with warm gooey lust, blissfully filling his body with radiating syrupy intoxication.
